events.name: Mariano's 30th / Chicago Trip
events.context: Mariano turns 30 on March 19th. Plan is a 1-2 night backpacking trip somewhere warm (weekend of Mar 14-15), then Chicago for the birthday celebration. Flights to Chicago already booked.
events.hook: Find and book warm backpacking destination immediately, then arrange onward flights to Chicago. Need to secure gear rentals from REI.

actions.name: Find warm backpacking destination (1-2 night, mid-March)
Book flight from backpacking to Chicago
Figure out REI gear rentals (backpack, tent, sleeping bag)

events.name: Japan Trip
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana, March 23 - April 7. Route: Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. Now in activity planning and shopping phase. Planning to buy 4 pairs of eyeglasses in Japan.
events.hook: Finalize activity itineraries for Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo. Research eyeglasses stores in Kyoto and validate insurance/prescription requirements before arrival.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
